title: Utilizzo di lettiera esausta per la produzione di fertilizzanti organici
description: A factsheet presenting a cooperative model for processing spent poultry litter into commercial organic fertilizers via pasteurization, aerobic bio-fermentation, and pelletization in compliance with EU Regulation 2019/1009. The practice aims to cut greenhouse gas emissions by 55%, improve carbon neutrality of broiler production, and simplify nitrate directive obligations for participating farms.
